voice.enabled_help: When on, persona replies also produce audio
voice.voice_id_help: Currently active voice · from FishAudio's model library

memory.delete_confirm_body: This cannot be undone. Events and thoughts that would be affected are listed below.

events.empty: No events yet · chat with the persona for a while and she'll summarise them herself

thoughts.empty: No long-term thoughts yet · once enough events accumulate she'll reflect on them

config.placeholder_notice: The config panel is coming in a future release · for now edit ~/.echovessel/config.toml directly then `echovessel reload`

onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Take a few minutes to give your persona a starting point
onboarding.path_blank_body: Describe who she is · how she sees herself · what she knows about you · her current mood · your relationship
onboarding.path_material_body: Paste a bio / journal / character brief · the LLM drafts the 5 blocks for you to review
onboarding.persona_placeholder: Who she is · personality · voice · values
onboarding.self_placeholder: Can be left blank · it fills in through conversation
onboarding.user_placeholder: Can be left blank · she'll learn you over time
